assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() to register IdentityServer services in DI
Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'api1'
assertions.rationale: Lines 9-12 call AddInMemoryApiScopes with ApiScope("api1", "My API").

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryClients with a client having ClientId 'm2m.client' and AllowedGrantTypes set to ClientCredentials
assertions.rationale: Lines 13-22 define a client with ClientId = "m2m.client" and AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.ClientCredentials.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls app.UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline before app.UseAuthorization()
assertions.rationale: Line 27 UseIdentityServer() appears before line 28 UseAuthorization().
Line 26 UseRouting() appears before line 27 UseIdentityServer().
